Uses of Class
model.entity.Entity

Package
Description
model.entity

model.entity.detectable.entities

  • Uses of Entity in model.entity

    Subclasses of Entity in model.entity
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    Player
    The entity that represents the Player and can be controlled it's movement and it's interaction by the user.

  • Uses of Entity in model.entity.detectable

    Subclasses of Entity in model.entity.detectable
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    Detectable
    Detectable is a type of Entity that other than having the normal hitbox, it also has the dtcbox (detectbox), used to check if certain Entity is within it's dtcbox.
    class 
    Interactable
    Detectable entity that allows an additional interactions with the Player.

  • Uses of Entity in model.entity.detectable.entities

    Subclasses of Entity in model.entity.detectable.entities
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    ControlRoom
    ControlRoom is basically an Interactable that represents an entrance that the Player need have a full pass to get access into and winning the game.
    class 
    Furniture
    Furnitures is an Interactable used to search the pass inside, waiting for the percentage gets to 0 before getting the item inside (action helped by the manager) and deactivate.
    class 
    Lift
    Entity that represents a Lift platform for the Player to stand on and control.
    class 
    Terminal
    Terminal is an Interactable that used to interupt the Play temporarily to get access to it's screen
    Methods in model.entity.detectable.entities with parameters of type Entity
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    Lift.isInTheWay(Entity e)
    Checks if the entity given is on the way of a moving platform
    void
    Lift.push(Entity e)
    Given an entity, it pushes on the direction is going

  • Uses of Entity in model.entity.enemy

    Subclasses of Entity in model.entity.enemy
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    Enemy
    Enemy is a type of Entity that other than having the normal hitbox, it has also the atkbox (attackbox), used to check if certain Entity is within it's atkbox and to destroy/kill it (actions helped by the manager).

  • Uses of Entity in model.entity.enemy.entities

    Subclasses of Entity in model.entity.enemy.entities
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    Ball
    Ball is an Enemy that represents a simple floating ball that continuously chase the Player.
    class 
    Robot
    Robot is an Enemy that represents a simple grounded robot that can have different behavior upon the creation (depending also if it has the range attack).

  • Uses of Entity in model.util

    Methods in model.util that return Entity
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static Entity
    EntityFactory.createEntity(int type, int x, int y, int specialData)
    Gets 4 integers that acts like important datas for the creation of the Entity
